==== varianceComputationNoCrash.tlua (196 errors) ====
    // https://github.com/microsoft/typescript-go/issues/2935
    
    type Whitespace = '\u{9}' | '\u{A}' | '\u{B}' | '\u{C}' | '\u{D}' | '\u{20}' | '\u{85}' | '\u{A0}' | '\u{1680}' | '\u{2000}' | '\u{2001}' | '\u{2002}' | '\u{2003}' | '\u{2004}' | '\u{2005}' | '\u{2006}' | '\u{2007}' | '\u{2008}' | '\u{2009}' | '\u{200A}' | '\u{2028}' | '\u{2029}' | '\u{202F}' | '\u{205F}' | '\u{3000}' | '\u{FEFF}';
    type WordSeparators = '-' | '_' | Whitespace;
    type Simplify<T> = {[KeyType in keyof T]: T[KeyType]} & {};
    type IsAny<T> = 0 extends 1 & T ? true : false;
    type IsNever<T> = [T] extends [never] ? true : false;
                      ~
!!! error TLUA1110: Type expected.
                                  ~
!!! error TLUA1110: Type expected.
    type IfAny<T, TypeIfAny = true, TypeIfNotAny = false> = IsAny<T> extends true ? TypeIfAny : TypeIfNotAny;
    type IfNever<T, TypeIfNever = true, TypeIfNotNever = false> = IsNever<T> extends true ? TypeIfNever : TypeIfNotNever;
    type RequiredKeysOf<BaseType extends object> = Exclude<{[Key in keyof BaseType]: BaseType extends Record<Key, BaseType[Key]> ? Key : never}[keyof BaseType], undefined>;
    type OptionalKeysOf<BaseType extends object> = Exclude<{[Key in keyof BaseType]: BaseType extends Record<Key, BaseType[Key]> ? never : Key}[keyof BaseType], undefined>;
    type OmitIndexSignature<ObjectType> = {[KeyType in keyof ObjectType as {} extends Record<KeyType, unknown> ? never : KeyType]: ObjectType[KeyType]};
    type PickIndexSignature<ObjectType> = {[KeyType in keyof ObjectType as {} extends Record<KeyType, unknown> ? KeyType : never]: ObjectType[KeyType]};
    type SimpleMerge<Destination, Source> = {[Key in keyof Destination as Key extends keyof Source ? never : Key]: Destination[Key]} & Source;
    type Merge<Destination, Source> = Simplify<SimpleMerge<PickIndexSignature<Destination>, PickIndexSignature<Source>> & SimpleMerge<OmitIndexSignature<Destination>, OmitIndexSignature<Source>>>;
    type TrimLeft<V extends string> = V extends `${Whitespace}${infer R}` ? TrimLeft<R> : V;
    type TrimRight<V extends string> = V extends `${infer R}${Whitespace}` ? TrimRight<R> : V;
    type Trim<V extends string> = TrimLeft<TrimRight<V>>;
    type IsLowerCase<T extends string> = T extends Lowercase<T> ? true : false;
    type IsUpperCase<T extends string> = T extends Uppercase<T> ? true : false;
    type IsNumeric<T extends string> = T extends `${number}` ? Trim<T> extends T ? true : false : false;
    type ApplyDefaultOptions<
        Options extends object,
        Defaults extends Simplify<Omit<Required<Options>, RequiredKeysOf<Options>> & Partial<Record<RequiredKeysOf<Options>, never>>>,
        SpecifiedOptions extends Options,
    > = IfAny<SpecifiedOptions, Defaults, IfNever<SpecifiedOptions, Defaults, Simplify<Merge<Defaults, {[Key in keyof SpecifiedOptions as Key extends OptionalKeysOf<Options> ? undefined extends SpecifiedOptions[Key] ? never : Key : Key]: SpecifiedOptions[Key]}> & Required<Options>>>>;
    
    type SkipEmptyWord<Word extends string> = Word extends '' ? [] : [Word];
                                                                   ~
!!! error TLUA1005: '?' expected.
                                                                     ~
!!! error TLUA1110: Type expected.
    type RemoveLastCharacter<Sentence extends string, Character extends string> = Sentence extends `${infer LeftSide}${Character}` ? SkipEmptyWord<LeftSide> : never;
    type WordsOptions = { splitOnNumbers?: boolean };
    type DefaultWordsOptions = { splitOnNumbers: true };
    
    type WordsImplementation<
        Sentence extends string,
        Options extends Required<WordsOptions>,
        LastCharacter extends string = '',
        CurrentWord extends string = '',
    > = Sentence extends `${infer FirstCharacter}${infer RemainingCharacters}`
        ? FirstCharacter extends WordSeparators
            ? [...SkipEmptyWord<CurrentWord>, ...WordsImplementation<RemainingCharacters, Options>]
              ~
!!! error TLUA1110: Type expected.
               ~~~
!!! error TLUA1110: Type expected.
                  ~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
                  ~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2693: 'SkipEmptyWord' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
                                ~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'CurrentWord'.
                                                 ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
                                                 ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2693: 'WordsImplementation' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
                                                                     ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'RemainingCharacters'.
                                                                                          ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'Options'.
                                                                                                  ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
            : LastCharacter extends ''
            ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
              ~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
              ~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'LastCharacter'.
                            ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
                ? WordsImplementation<RemainingCharacters, Options, FirstCharacter, FirstCharacter>
                ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
                  ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2693: 'WordsImplementation' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
                                      ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'RemainingCharacters'.
                                                           ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'Options'.
                                                                    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'FirstCharacter'.
                                                                                    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'FirstCharacter'.
                : [false, true] extends [IsNumeric<LastCharacter>, IsNumeric<FirstCharacter>]
                ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
                  ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
                   ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2695: Left side of comma operator is unused and has no side effects.
                              ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
                                ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
                                        ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
                                         ~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2693: 'IsNumeric' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
                                                   ~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'LastCharacter'.
                                                                   ~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2693: 'IsNumeric' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
                                                                             ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'FirstCharacter'.
                                                                                            ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
                    ? Options['splitOnNumbers'] extends true
                    ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
                      ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'Options'.

        : [...SkipEmptyWord<CurrentWord>];
        ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
          ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
              ~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
              ~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2693: 'SkipEmptyWord' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
                            ~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'CurrentWord'.
                                        ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
    
    type Words<Sentence extends string, Options extends WordsOptions = {}> =
        WordsImplementation<Sentence, ApplyDefaultOptions<WordsOptions, DefaultWordsOptions, Options>>;
    
    type CamelCaseOptions = { preserveConsecutiveUppercase?: boolean };
    type DefaultCamelCaseOptions = { preserveConsecutiveUppercase: true };
    
    type CamelCaseFromArray<
        W extends string[],
        Options extends Required<CamelCaseOptions>,
        OutputString extends string = '',
    > = W extends [infer FirstWord extends string, ...infer RemainingWords extends string[]]
                  ~
!!! error TLUA1110: Type expected.
                                                 ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ']' expected.
                                                      ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
                                                      ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'infer'.
                                                            ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
                                                            ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'RemainingWords'.
                                                                           ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
                                                                                   ~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA7053: Element implicitly has an 'any' type because expression of type 'any' can't be used to index type 'StringLib'.
                                                                                          
!!! error TLUA1011: An element access expression should take an argument.
                                                                                           ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
        ? Options['preserveConsecutiveUppercase'] extends true
        ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
          ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'Options'.
                                                  ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
            ? `${Capitalize<FirstWord>}${CamelCaseFromArray<RemainingWords, Options>}`
            ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
                 ~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2693: 'Capitalize' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
                            ~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'FirstWord'.
                                         ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2693: 'CamelCaseFromArray' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
                                                            ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'RemainingWords'.
                                                                            ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'Options'.
            : `${Capitalize<Lowercase<FirstWord>>}${CamelCaseFromArray<RemainingWords, Options>}`
            ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
                 ~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2693: 'Capitalize' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
                                      ~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'FirstWord'.
                                                    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2693: 'CamelCaseFromArray' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
                                                                       ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'RemainingWords'.
                                                                                       ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'Options'.
        : OutputString;
        ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
          ~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'OutputString'.
    
    type CamelCase<Type, Options extends CamelCaseOptions = {}> = Type extends string
        ? string extends Type
            ? Type
            : Uncapitalize<CamelCaseFromArray<
                Words<Type extends Uppercase<Type> ? Lowercase<Type> : Type>,
                ApplyDefaultOptions<CamelCaseOptions, DefaultCamelCaseOptions, Options>
            >>
        : Type;
    
    // This would cause a stack overflow during variance computation
    function boom<T>(x: CamelCase<T>, y: CamelCase<T, {}>) {
        x = y
        y = x
    }
